content.json:
# Identity Propagation Dashboard

Operational visibility for the identity propagation PoC — traces, tokens, auth failures, and MCP request patterns.

## Identity Propagation Traces

APIM gateway logs for the `orders-mcp` API showing caller IP, response code, duration, and correlation.

content.query:
ApiManagementGatewayLogs
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where ApiId contains 'orders-mcp'
| project TimeGenerated, CallerIpAddress, ResponseCode, TotalTime, CorrelationId, Method, Url, BackendMethod, BackendUrl
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| take 100

ApiManagementGatewayLogs
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where ApiId contains 'orders-mcp'
| summarize count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 5m), tostring(ResponseCode)
| render timechart
content.title: MCP Requests Over Time by Status Code

content.json:
## Token Metrics

AI Gateway token usage from APIM gateway logs for the `azure-openai` API — request count and latency over time.

content.query:
ApiManagementGatewayLogs
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where ApiId contains 'azure-openai' or ApiId contains 'openai'
| summarize RequestCount=count(), AvgLatency=avg(TotalTime), P95Latency=percentile(TotalTime, 95) by bin(TimeGenerated, 15m)
| render timechart
content.title: OpenAI API Request Count & Latency

content.query:
ApiManagementGatewayLogs
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where ApiId contains 'azure-openai' or ApiId contains 'openai'
| project TimeGenerated, ResponseCode, TotalTime, CallerIpAddress, Method, Url
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| take 50
content.title: Recent OpenAI API Requests

content.json:
## Auth Failures

401 responses from the MCP API with WWW-Authenticate header details.

content.query:
ApiManagementGatewayLogs
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where ApiId contains 'orders-mcp'
| where ResponseCode == 401
| project TimeGenerated, CallerIpAddress, ResponseCode, LastErrorMessage, CorrelationId, Method, Url
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| take 100
content.title: 401 Unauthorized Responses

content.query:
ApiManagementGatewayLogs
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where ApiId contains 'orders-mcp'
| where ResponseCode == 401
| summarize FailureCount=count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| render barchart
content.title: Auth Failures Over Time

content.json:
## MCP Request Patterns

Successful MCP requests over time with count, average, and P95 latency.

content.query:
ApiManagementGatewayLogs
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where ApiId contains 'orders-mcp'
| where ResponseCode >= 200 and ResponseCode < 300
| summarize RequestCount=count(), AvgLatency=avg(TotalTime), P95Latency=percentile(TotalTime, 95) by bin(TimeGenerated, 15m)
| render timechart
content.title: Successful MCP Requests — Count & Latency

content.query:
ApiManagementGatewayLogs
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where ApiId contains 'orders-mcp'
| where ResponseCode >= 200 and ResponseCode < 300
| project TimeGenerated, TotalTime, CallerIpAddress, ResponseCode, CorrelationId, Method, Url
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| take 100
content.title: Recent Successful MCP Requests

content.json:
## E2E Request Flow

Correlates App Insights `requests` from chat-app and orders-api (by `cloud_RoleName`) with APIM gateway logs. After SDK instrumentation, traces from both Container Apps appear here alongside APIM requests.

content.query:
requests
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where cloud_RoleName contains 'orders' or cloud_RoleName contains 'chat'
| project timestamp, cloud_RoleName, name, resultCode, duration, operation_Id, url
| order by timestamp desc
| take 100
content.title: App Insights Requests (Chat App + Orders API)

content.query:
requests
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where cloud_RoleName contains 'orders' or cloud_RoleName contains 'chat'
| summarize RequestCount=count(), AvgDuration=avg(duration) by bin(timestamp, 5m), cloud_RoleName
| render timechart
content.title: Request Volume by Service Over Time
Cross-Layer Request Summary

content.json:
## Container App Logs

Stdout/stderr logs from both Container Apps (`ca-orders-api` and `ca-chat-app`). Use the keyword filter to search for specific log patterns.

content.query:
ContainerAppConsoleLogs_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where ContainerAppName_s in ('ca-orders-api', 'ca-chat-app')
| project TimeGenerated, ContainerAppName_s, Log_s
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| take 200
content.title: Recent Container App Logs

content.query:
ContainerAppConsoleLogs_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where ContainerAppName_s in ('ca-orders-api', 'ca-chat-app')
| where Log_s contains 'request_start' or Log_s contains 'chat_request' or Log_s contains 'chat_response'
| project TimeGenerated, ContainerAppName_s, Log_s
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| take 100
content.title: Structured Request Logs (request_start / chat_request / chat_response)

content.json:
## Errors Dashboard

Aggregated errors across all telemetry sources: APIM 4xx/5xx responses, Container App ERROR logs, and Cognitive Services failures.

content.title: Error Summary by Source
Errors Over Time by Source

content.query:
ContainerAppConsoleLogs_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where ContainerAppName_s in ('ca-orders-api', 'ca-chat-app')
| where Log_s contains 'ERROR' or Log_s contains 'Traceback' or Log_s contains 'Exception'
| project TimeGenerated, ContainerAppName_s, Log_s
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| take 50
content.title: Recent Error Details

content.json:
## OAuth Audit (Entra ID Sign-in Logs)

Shows token issuance events for the PoC's 3 Entra app registrations. This provides visibility into the Foundry/ApiHub OAuth pipeline that is otherwise opaque in APIM and App Insights telemetry.

**Data source requirement:** `SigninLogs` and `AADServicePrincipalSignInLogs` tables require Entra ID sign-in logs to be routed to this Log Analytics workspace via **Entra ID → Diagnostic settings**. If the tables are empty, use the standalone script instead: `python scripts/check-signin-logs.py`

> **Note:** In managed tenants, configuring Entra diagnostic settings requires the **Security Admin** role. If unavailable, the script queries the Graph API directly with `AuditLog.Read.All` delegated permission.

content.query:
SigninLogs
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where AppDisplayName has 'MCP Gateway' or AppDisplayName has 'Foundry OAuth' or AppDisplayName has 'Chat App'
| project TimeGenerated, UserDisplayName, AppDisplayName, ResourceDisplayName, ResultType, ResultDescription, IPAddress, ConditionalAccessStatus, Location=tostring(LocationDetails.city)
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| take 100
content.title: Interactive Sign-in Events (User Token Issuance)

content.query:
AADServicePrincipalSignInLogs
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where ServicePrincipalName has 'MCP Gateway' or ServicePrincipalName has 'Foundry OAuth' or ServicePrincipalName has 'Chat App'
| project TimeGenerated, ServicePrincipalName, ResourceDisplayName, ResultType, ResultDescription, IPAddress
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| take 100
content.title: Service Principal Sign-ins (Background Token Refreshes)

content.query:
SigninLogs
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where AppDisplayName has 'MCP Gateway' or AppDisplayName has 'Foundry OAuth' or AppDisplayName has 'Chat App'
| extend Status = iff(ResultType == 0, 'Success', 'Failure')
| summarize Count=count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h), Status
| render barchart
content.title: Sign-in Success vs Failure Over Time

content.query:
SigninLogs
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where AppDisplayName has 'MCP Gateway' or AppDisplayName has 'Foundry OAuth' or AppDisplayName has 'Chat App'
| where ResultType != 0
| project TimeGenerated, UserDisplayName, AppDisplayName, ResultType, ResultDescription, ConditionalAccessStatus
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| take 50
content.title: Failed Sign-in Events (Error Details)
